description: Identity attribute sources for enriching and generating federated identities.

AttributeSource.description: An attribute source defining where an attribute value originates.

name.description: The friendly name of the source attribute. It must be unique.

type.description: The type of the attribute source.
enumDescriptions: credential: The attribute is from the authenticated context.
value: The attribute is plain text from the value parameter.
ldap: The attribute is retrieved from an LDAP server.

value.description: The value of the source attribute. For credential type: The name of a credential attribute from the authenticated context which contains the value. For value type: The plain text to be used as the source attribute value. For LDAP type: The name of the LDAP attribute to be used.

properties.description: The properties associated with an attribute source.

Property.description: A property for an attribute source.

key.description: The property key. Valid fields for LDAP include 'serverConnection', 'scope', 'selector', 'searchFilter', 'baseDN'.
